title: First Number Divisible by Both 3 and 4 in a Custom

content.problemStatement:
Complete the C program to ask the user for a starting number and an ending number. Then, use a for loop to search for the first number in the range that is divisible by both 3 and 4. Once found, print and exit the loop using the `break` statement.

**You can assume that the range will always contain at least one such number.**

---
